resources.string: Select KeyAura as your default keyboard

KeyAura is a professional Android custom keyboard featuring stunning radial color animations on every key press, Roman Urdu to Urdu transliteration, and a sleek dark UI designed for the ultimate typing experience.
Built with passion for users who want both style and functionality in their daily typing.
Features: • Multi-color radial animations • Roman Urdu to Urdu typing • Smart Enter key • Auto-return to letters • Customizable settings • Landscape support
Version 1.0.0
